title: Jyl Somtay
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image=[[File:Jyl_Somtay.jpg]] |name=Jyl Somtay |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]]{{InsiderCite|79|Death in the Catacombs}} |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Color/Legends|Blonde]] |feathers= |eyes=Gray |skin=Fair |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |masters=[[Lura Tranor]] |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Jedi Knight ''Jyl Somtay''—''not'' pleased to make your acquaintance!|Jyl Somtay, to [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]]|{{TCWComicCite|6.28|Jedi Masquerade}}}} '''Jyl Somtay''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. ==Biography== ===Early life=== {{Quote|Actually, I'm just as glad Master Anakin ''isn't'' here. I mean, I'm sure we'll ''escape,'' but—''"
"''I lost ''my'' Master on Geonosis. I know how you ''feel,'' Ahsoka.|[[Ahsoka Tano/Legends|Ahsoka Tano]] and Jyl Somtay|''[[The Clone Wars: The Starcrusher Trap]]''}} Discovered to be [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] as a child, the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] Jyl Somtay entered into the [[Jedi academy|academy]] at the [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] and began to learn the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Eventually [[Initiate Trials/Legends|graduating]] the academy, Somtay was selected as a [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]] by [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Lura Tranor]] to travel [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and train one-on-one. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Somtay became well acquainted with [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Councilor]] [[Coleman Trebor/Legends|Coleman Trebor]]. Constructing for herself a blue-bladed [[lightsaber]] and growing knowledgeable about the Force, Somtay spent many years with Tranor until she was ready to pass her [[Jedi Trials/Legends|Trials of Knighthood]]. ====Battle of Geonosis==== [[File:Jyl_Somtay2.jpg|thumb|180px|Jyl Somtay rescuing a clone trooper.]] Completing the trials and becoming a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]], Somtay was not among the Jedi to travel to [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] at the height of the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]] between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]; a mission that would spark the tragic and bloody [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Both Somtay's former master [[Lura Tranor]] and her good friend Master [[Coleman Trebor]] died on the dust fields of Geonosis. ===The Clone Wars=== ====Death in the Catacombs==== [[File:PandoorSomtay-DitC.jpg|left|thumb|221x221px|Somtay defending herself and her new ally from a nexu.]] Somtay accepted a mission to the battered world immediately after the battle there. Having been given the rank of [[Jedi Commander/Legends|Commander]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], Somtay was placed in charge of several [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]]. Leading an occupation force of clone troopers on Geonosis, Somtay was assigned to oversee the local population's cooperation in transitioning into a Republic-occupied society. During her work there Somtay was contacted by [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Frayne]], a scientist studying the world's local culture, and asked to join the Jedi in her work. Volunteering to aide Somtay uncover and contain [[Geonosian/Legends|Geonosian]] war technology, Frayne secretly desired to steal the tech and sell it on the black market. Upon meeting with Frayne, Somtay was rendered unconscious and awoke some time later tied back to back with Frayne's companion, [[Naj Pandoor]]. After freeing themselves and fighting off a group of Geonsosians, the pair set out in search of Frayne. Jedi Somtay and Pandoor quickly discovered the doctor's severed head; the woman had been killed by a loosed [[Nexu/Legends|nexu]]. Somtay managed to escape the nexu herself when the beast was attacked by a pack of [[roga]]s. ====The Starcrusher Trap==== {{Quote|We should be ''flattered,'' actually...that they went to all this trouble to get rid of ''us.'' But ''burning'' to death…that'll be bad. Freezing would be better. At least you'd be ''numb…''''"
"''That's ''enough,'' Master Somtay! Remember your ''training!'' We are ''Jedi!'' We do not ''succumb'' to ''despair!'' We ''will'' escape this! Is that ''clear?''''"
"''Y-yes, Master Windu…but ''how?''''"
"''I don't ''know'' yet.|Jyl Somtay and [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]]|}} [[File:Starcrusher.jpg|thumb|180px|The ''Starcrusher,'' the strike team's target.]] Around the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]],These events happen after the [[Battle of Christophsis/Legends|Battle of Christophsis]], which occurs in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], according to ''[[Star Wars Annual 2011]]''. Somtay joined on an [[Attack on the Separatist munitions factory|attack against]] a [[Separatist munitions factory]]. She recovered Master [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] after their [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class destroyers]] were obliterated by the Separatist [[Battleship/Legends|battleship]] ''[[Starcrusher/Legends|Starcrusher]]''. Somtay piloted a [[T-6 shuttle/Legends|T-6 shuttle]] into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] past the ''Starcrusher.'' Upon their return to Coruscant, the Jedi Council decided to send a strike team to destroy the ''Starcrusher.'' The strike team consisted of Masters Kenobi, Master [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]], and [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]], along with Somtay and Skywalker's Padawan, [[Ahsoka Tano/Legends|Ahsoka Tano]]. Skywalker was sent to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Daltarri]] at the behest of [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. The strike team, along with three ''Venator''-class Star Destroyers, attacked a [[Tanker/Legends|Separatist refueling ship]] in [[Realspace/Legends|deep space]]. The Jedi team left one of the [[Warship/Legends|warships]] in a T-6 shuttle and Somtay flew them under the refueling ship's detection grid. The ''Starcrusher'' then arrived, and the Republic ships left. The Jedi team snuck aboard the refueling ship as the ''Starcrusher'' [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Kirst (admiral)|Kirst]] launched reinforcements. The refueling ship's Captain Jorm met the squad of [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] as they came onboard. Once the droids were out of sight, the Jedi attacked the droids and used their shells as a disguise. The strike team then took the droid's [[Sheathipede-class transport shuttle/Legends|''Sheathipede''-class shuttle]] to board the ''Starcrusher.'' Once aboard, the Jedi left their disguises. The crew of the Separatist warship detected their presence, and Admiral Kirst ordered his crew to abandon ship—the ship the Jedi had boarded was a decoy. When the Jedi went back to the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]], the shuttle exploded. The Jedi were stuck onboard with a failing life support, and the decoy was heading into the nearby [[Star/Legends|star]]. [[File:Infiltration_of_the_Starcrusher.png|left|thumb|220x220px|Jedi Masters Somtay, Ki-Adi-Mundi, Windu, Kenobi and Padawan Ahsoka Tano climb the lift shaft of the ''Starcrusher.'']] Tano and Somtay split off from the others to explore the ship. They discovered a Separatist [[Officer/Legends|officer]], [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Daan (Human)|Daan]]. Somtay tried a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] on the woman, but the crew had been conditioned to resist such tricks. The two Jedi convinced her to help them. Daan showed the Jedi a cache of [[Environment suit/Legends|space suits]]. Kenobi was then contacted by Skywalker, who had arrived after feeling a premonition of danger on Dalltarri. Just then, the real ''Starcrusher'' arrived. Kenobi came up with a plan to escape. He had the strike team pull up wire as Skywalker attacked the warship. Kenobi succeeded in magnetizing the decoy's hull and drew the real ship in. The strike team escaped from the decoy as both Separatist warships were drawn into the star, and the team was picked up by a [[Power harpoon launcher|tow cable]] from Skywalker's [[Anakin Skywalker's Delta-7B Aethersprite-class light interceptor/Legends|starfighter]]. The team later returned to the Jedi Temple, and Somtay and Tano planned on going out for [[Caf/Legends|caf]] and "girl talk." [[File:Assassination_attempt_on_Yong_Dolor.jpg|thumb|221x221px|Somtay slicing through Aurra Sing's blaster rifle after she attacked the Jedi Master with it.]] ====Assassination Attempt on Senator Yong Dolor==== {{Quote|''No''! That rifle cost me—''"
"''Its ''going'' to cost you your ''freedom''!''"
"''Or your ''life''!|Sing and Somtay| in [[21 BBY]],This story is set around the time of "[[Heroes on Both Sides]]" ([[21 BBY/Legends|21 BBY]]), which marks the debut of revamped appearances for several main characters. Considering that the [[Star Wars comic books|comics]] featured in [[Star Wars Comic|''Star Wars Comic UK'']] are published in chronological order, and that "''[[Burn the Behemoth!]]''" is the first comic in the series to feature the new character models, it can be concluded that "''Jedi Masquerade''" takes place in 21 BBY. by infamous bounty hunter [[Aurra Sing]] on the wishes of [[Lorn (aide)|Lorn]], Dolor's aide, wanting to take his place as Senator. Somtay confronted Sing, telling her that she was the target, and knocking her weapon away with her lightsaber. Sing drew a poisoned [[ryyk blade]], but the Jedi succeeded in capturing her. She tried a [[Mind trick/Legends|mind trick]] to reveal the bounty hunter's client, but Sing faked compliance, and was dragged away by [[GU-series Guardian police droid/Legends|GU-series "Guardian" police droids]]. Somtay was then thanked by Lorn and Dolor. Later, at the Temple, Master Windu offered his assistance to Somtay as she disguised herself as Sing in an attempt to find out who the Senator's enemies were. Meanwhile, Sing broke out of confinement after faking a medical emergency. Somtay investigated a dive bar, claiming she was there to get paid. The real Sing then arrived, and the two started fighting again. They dropped a blade and a lightsaber in the melee. Ultimately Somtay prevailed, knocking out the bounty hunter. They then insisted that she get paid and met the client. When Lorn revealed himself, Somtay insisted he was under arrest. Lorn drew a spear, but she deflected it with her lightsaber, and the aide surrendered. Afterward, Windu debriefed her, stating that as unconventional as Somtay's plan was, it was also effective. ==Behind the scenes== Jyl Somtay first appeared in the short story "[[Death in the Catacombs]]," from ''[[Star Wars Insider 79]]''. ==Appearances== *{{InsiderCite|79|Death in the Catacombs}} {{1st}} *''[[The Clone Wars: The Starcrusher Trap]]'' *{{TCWComicCite|6.28|Jedi Masquerade}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Jyl Somtay}} {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Jyl Somtay#legends }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Somtay, Jyl}} [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Jedi Generals]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi Knights]]
